compiled_state.title: Scaffold RED eval for red-test-evaluator runtime check
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Eval config exists and is valid YAML with at least 2 scenarios
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; c=yaml.safe_load(open('evals/red-test-evaluator/promptfooconfig.yaml')); assert len(c.get('tests', [])) >= 2"
- [ ] Eval uses llm-rubric assertion type asserting REVISE verdict on >10s unit test runtime
  Verify: grep -q "llm-rubric" evals/red-test-evaluator/promptfooconfig.yaml
- [ ] Eval includes backward-compat scenario: absent ESTIMATED_RUNTIME fields -> evaluator does NOT issue runtime-based REVISE
  Verify: python3 -c "import yaml; c=yaml.safe_load(open('evals/red-test-evaluator/promptfooconfig.yaml')); assert any('absent' in str(t).lower() or 'missing' in str(t).lower() or 'backward' in str(t).lower() for t in c.get('tests', []))"
- [ ] Running eval against current evaluator confirms RED (assertion fails)
  Verify: manual — run eval, confirm assertion failure

## TDD Role
Creates RED test for evaluator changes.

## Covers
SC6 (evaluator portion, RED phase)

## Files
- Create: evals/red-test-evaluator/promptfooconfig.yaml

comments.body: Fixed: RED eval scaffolded with 2 scenarios (runtime-over-budget, backward-compat). Completion verifier PASS.
comments.author: Main
